acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md promotes the Unreleased section to a dated 0.13.0 heading; no entry content is altered.
dist/rigor.cjs is byte-identical to a fresh build and .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs stays byte-identical to it (no source change).
npm run test:all, npm run bench, and claude plugin validate . --strict pass; git diff --check is clean.
constraints: Version bump and changelog promotion only; no source, dist, schema, workflow, or evidence changes beyond task evidence.
Do not modify dist/rigor.cjs or .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs; both must remain byte-identical to a fresh build.
